title: Chat Interface Anatomy
description: An annotated, interactive chat-UI mockup with twelve numbered markers explaining each component's design rationale and best practices.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.topic: Chat interface design and UI components
learningObjectives: Identify the standard components of a chat interface
Explain the design rationale and best practices for each component
educational.prerequisites: Familiarity with using a chat or messaging app

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Annotated interactive mockup with click-to-reveal component details
pedagogical.assessment: Students annotate a chat UI of their own design using the same component categories
